origin.origins-es.koj428.description: who the fck is this? difficult: +5
origin.origins-es.mr_white_____.descript: white man with white... nevermind. difficult: +10
power.origins-es.rtppoting.name: [+]Grandpa's tincture
power.origins-es.rtppoting.description: You’ve inherited your grandpa's legendary moonshine wisdom. This lets you craft sketchy ingredient bags for both Random Teleport and Absolute Random Teleport potions. Side effects may include sudden location changes. difficulty: +20
power.origins-es.blind.name: [-]blind
power.origins-es.blind.description: ur vision is so bad bro. difficult: -35
power.origins-es.tpmarksave.name: [+]Save TP Mark
power.origins-es.tpmarksave.description: save your tp mark. if you sneaking it will save your targeted entity if you not it will save your coordinates.
power.origins-es.tpmarkgo.name: [+]TP to TP Mark
power.origins-es.tpmarkgo.description: tp you to your tp mark. if you sneaking it will tp you to your saved entity if you not it will tp you to your saved coordinates. difficult: +20
power.origins-es.shield_crush.name: [+]Crush Shield!
power.origins-es.shield_crush.descriptio: Hit on opponents shield will in moment crush it and hit again. difficult: +5
power.origins-es.lightbulb.name: [+-]Light-bulb?
power.origins-es.lightbulb.description: Being a literal glowing blob of light makes you an easy target to spot, but in return, your gaze pierces the darkness just as easily, outlining every creature in your sight. difficult: -5
power.origins-es.nyctophobia.name: [-]Nyctophobia
power.origins-es.nyctophobia.description: Accustomed to the light, you fear the darkness. Darkness makes you weak and slow. difficult: -15
power.origins-es.energy-consuming.name: [-]Energy Consumption
power.origins-es.energy-consuming.descri: You use your energy too wastefully, so you get hungry much faster than an ordinary person(in 5 times). difficult: -10
power.origins-es.favtoy.name: [+]Favourite toy
power.origins-es.favtoy.description: You have mastered your favorite toy so thoroughly that you can recreate its core mechanism and its most powerful wind enchantment. difficult: +20
power.origins-es.invertytoggle.name: [+]Invert Y
power.origins-es.invertytoggle.descripti: When the ability is on and you almost fell to the ground your Y velocity multiplies on ~-1,2 but it will spend wind charge`s in your inventory. difficult: +25
power.origins-es.invertylogic.name: inverty2
power.origins-es.invertylogic.descriptio: for some reasons i need to split ineverty in to 2 filles ignore this
power.origins-es.fallsave.name: [+]fall save
power.origins-es.fallsave.description: any blob never scared to fall. difficult: +15
